rent.note: furnished 1BR in Ruzafa or El Carmen; €900–1,100 typical

diningOut.note: menú del día €10–15; cafes and restaurants

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base.

evidence.quote: Expect €900 to €1,800 for a 2-bedroom flat, depending on district. Valencia remains 15 to 20 percent cheaper than Madrid or Barcelona, but rent has risen 12 to 15 percent year-on-year

evidence.claim: Valencia monthly cost $1,300–$2,100 for solo nomad
evidence.quote: For a solo digital nomad, the average monthly cost is €1,200–1,900 ($1,300–$2,100)

evidence.claim: Menú del día best value in Europe at €10–15
evidence.quote: Menu del Día lunch specials offer 3 courses for €10–€15, representing the best value in Europe

evidence.claim: Digital Nomad Visa income minimum aligns with comfortable living
evidence.quote: The Spain Digital Nomad Visa requires a minimum of approximately €2,160/month ($2,350), which aligns with comfortable living expenses for a single person
